scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n vite,wrangler -c blue,green "vite dev --port 5173 --host 0.0.0.0" "wrangler pages dev --compatibility-date=2024-09-23 --proxy 5173 --ip 0.0.0.0 --port 8788"
scripts.dev:http: npx concurrently -n vite,wrangler -c blue,green "vite dev --port 5173 --host 0.0.0.0" "wrangler pages dev --compatibility-date=2024-09-23 --proxy 5173 --ip 0.0.0.0 --port 8788"
scripts.deploy: vite build && wrangler pages deploy dist
